reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The gas station has excellent service, a nice snack bar, and even a tire inflator, which is not common in gas stations in Argentina.

(Original)
Posto com atendimento muito bom, uma bela lancheria e o posto possui calibrador de pneus, que não é comum em postos de combustíveis na Argentina

reviews.comment:
Linda estación ideal para sus habitantes pero en temporada de alta se satura para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Nice station, ideal for its inhabitants, but during peak season it gets very crowded when refueling.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Napoleón, si la verdad que en temporada y en especial en esta que fue muy buena, no damos a basto! Un abrazo y buen viaje!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwd0lYY3J3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy amables las personas que nos atendieron en la playa al momento de atendernos.

(Translated by Google)
The people who served us on the beach were very kind when they attended to us.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Sabrina! Trasladaremos tu comentario al personal! Saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OcFkyc3lTa1l3VjA5dGNWSjBkRzE1YlVaWlJXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Lástima que las YPF Full no tienen un buen café italiano como Segafredo, Illy o Lavatza.

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame that YPF Full doesn't have good Italian coffee like Segafredo, Illy or Lavatza.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Máximo! Te cuento que en Cafayate vendemos café suyay de excelente calidad y molido en el momento, siempre es muy bien valorado por los clientes. De todas maneras muchas gracias por tu comentario. Saludos

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion en los 20 años que llevo cargando en la YPF nunca tuve ningun problema, sus precios suelen ser mas bajos que sheel
Por eso recomiendo YPF excelente gasolinera argentina

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. In the 20 years I've been filling up at YPF, I've never had a problem. Their prices are usually lower than Shell. That's why I recommend YPF; it's an excellent Argentine gas station.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Maxi, si un orgullo pertenecer a YPF que tiene los combustibles de mejor calidad del país al mejor precio y representando a nuestra argentina como espresa nacional! Saludos!
